---
title: "Precios del plátano en Tenerife"
author: "Luis López-Manzanares"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = F,
  message = F,
  options(OutDec = ","),
  fig.dim = c(6, 5) # width = 6, height = 5 
  )
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r data-load}
ds <- read_delim("../data/raw/dataset-ISTAC-C00014A_000012-1.2-observations.tsv",
                 show_col_types = FALSE) %>% 
  rename_all(tolower) %>% 
  filter(
    territorio == "Tenerife",
    !is.na(obs_value)
    ) %>% 
  select(1,3,6) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = medidas,
    values_from = obs_value
  ) %>% 
  select(1,2) %>% 
  mutate(
    year = str_sub(time_period, 1, 4),
    week = str_sub(time_period, length(time_period)-2, length(time_period)) #esto no va
  )

```
